since_last: 37% of 86 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.72%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 37% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.22% · BTC -4.50% · Gold -2.52% · Nasdaq100 -0.23%. 37% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.72%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.72%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -1.61%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMR is the standout at -5.71%
cards.body: Leaders: UPST +4.97%, INTU +3.91%, ZBRA +3.82%, PUBM +3.56%, WDAY +3.34%. Laggards: SMR -5.71%, ORCL -5.30%, OKLO -5.28%, OKLO -5.28%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.17% at $155.84
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.17% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
